title: erigeron reductus var. reductus
intro: Erigeron reductus var. reductus, also known as the reduced fleabane, is a variety of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its roots and leaves, which contain sesquiterpene lactones that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Erigeron reductus var. reductus include its potential to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
